intent: Add a decision log viewer to the Electron desktop app so operators can inspect governance decisions without using the CLI.
acceptance_criteria: Decision log viewer component displays entries from decisions.jsonl
Viewer supports filtering by agent, outcome, and time range
IPC handler reads log via StateIO + LogReader (same path as CLI archon log)
Entry detail shows full decision context (action, triggered rules, RS hash, timestamps)
Desktop build succeeds with the new component
